mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, password, dept_name, use_yn, root_yn, auth_id, login_fail_cnt, password_change_dt, start_menu_id, work_location_code, work_type, desk_ip, dev_id, reg_dt, mod_dt FROM tb_login_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_login_user SET login_fail_cnt = #{cnt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
